title: Users may be unable to create or edit agents in Microsoft 365 Copilot
impact: Users may have been unable to create or edit agents in Copilot.

updates.content:
Title: Users may be unable to create or edit agents in Microsoft 365 Copilot

User impact: Users may be unable to create or edit agents in Copilot.

Current status: We're investigating a potential issue with Copilot and checking for impact to your organization. We'll provide an update within 30 minutes.

Title: Users may be unable to create or edit agents in Microsoft 365 Copilot

User impact: Users may be unable to create or edit agents in Copilot.

Current status: We're analyzing system logs to help identify the source of the issue and determine our next troubleshooting steps.

Scope of impact: This issue may potentially impact any user attempting to create or edit agents in Copilot. This information may be updated as our investigation continues.

Next update by: Tuesday, April 21, 2026, at 8:00 AM UTC

Title: Users may be unable to create or edit agents in Microsoft 365 Copilot

User impact: Users may have been unable to create or edit agents in Copilot.

Final status: We identified a portion of infrastructure responsible for responding to requests in Copilot that was timing out, causing errors when creating or editing agents. Our telemetry indicated that the service recovered without manual intervention, and as a precaution to prevent further impact, we increased the timeout duration.

Scope of impact: This issue may have potentially impacted any user attempting to create or edit agents in Copilot.

Start time: Tuesday, April 21, 2026, at 2:25 AM UTC

End time: Tuesday, April 21, 2026, at 5:05 AM UTC

Root cause: A portion of infrastructure responsible for responding to requests in Copilot was timing out, causing errors with creating or editing agents.

Next steps: 
 - We're continuing our analysis of the impacted of the affected infrastructure to better understand what triggered the initial degradation, which will help us in preventing similar events from occurring in the future.

This is the final update for the event.
